steps.title: Notice the contrast
steps.content: The sculpture is exposed to rain, snow, heat, and humidity, but it remains in good condition because of its corrosion-resistant steel. The transition must concede the harsh exposure and pivot to the surprising preservation.

steps.title: Use a concession
steps.content: Choice A wrongly makes harsh weather the cause of good condition. Choice C merely adds information without contrast. Choice D signals a direct contradiction, which is stronger than the passage needs. A concession phrase fits the shift. The answer is B.
